fields.name: sEQNoAsset
fields.label: Line No.
fields.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SEQ_No_Asset),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM A_AMORTIZATIONLINE WHERE A_ASSET_ID=@A_ASSET_ID@

derivation.source: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SEQ_No_Asset),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM A_AMORTIZATIONLINE WHERE A_ASSET_ID=@A_ASSET_ID@
